title: Amtech T1875 12mm D Shackle Combination Lock
features: NON-SCRATCHING: This hardened, non-scratching D shackle lock with an easy-set 4 digit combination lock is ideal for securing sheds, garages and doors
SIZE: The D-lock has a 12mm diameter and an internal shackle size of 115mm x 190mm
PRE-SET: The combination is pre-set to open at 0-0-0-0
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your security requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
